security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc:

bundle.shortDescription: Issue and manage IsoApplet smart cards.
bundle.longDescription: Curvault is a desktop workstation for personalizing JavaCard smart cards: manages GlobalPlatform keys in the OS keychain, installs applets via embedded gp, drives pkcs15-init with custom token info (label / manufacturer / serial), generates per-card key + certificate sets according to user-defined profiles, and manages FIDO2 authenticators.
